title: Macroeconomic Dynamics & Monetary Policy

phillips.formula: π_t = β·E_t[π_{t+1}] + κ·x_t: inflation = discounted future + output gap
phillips.why: Expectation update: E_t[π] = EML-2 (Gaussian belief); output gap = EML-2

non_linear_PC.type: TYPE 2 Horizon (flattening at ZLB or high inflation)
non_linear_PC.why: Threshold non-linearity = EML-∞; shadow=2 (still log-linear near anchor)

taylor.object: Taylor rule: i_t = r* + π* + 1.5(π_t - π*) + 0.5·x_t
taylor.why: Linear feedback rule: i = real_rate + deviation_terms = EML-2

zero_lower_bound.why: ZLB kink = EML-∞; shadow=2 (deviation from anchor = EML-2)

fiscal.formula: Multiplier = 1/(1 - c(1-t)): closed-form rational = EML-0 → EML-2 with dynamics

dynamic_multiplier.formula: Y(t) = Y_0·exp(-t/τ): decay toward new steady state = EML-2

regime.object: Monetary policy regime shift (Volcker disinflation, ZLB)

log_linearization.why: Log-linear approximation around SS: all variables log-deviations = EML-2

stochastic_shock.formula: a_t = ρ·a_{t-1} + ε_t: AR(1) shock = EML-2

semiring_verdicts.new_finding: Static fiscal multiplier=EML-0; dynamic fiscal = EML-2 (EML-0→EML-2 via dynamics)

key_theorem: Macro Semiring Theorem (S296): Log-linearized macroeconomics = CLOSED EML-2 SUBRING. Phillips curve, Taylor rule, DSGE: 2⊗2=2. Static fiscal multiplier = EML-0 (algebraic ratio); dynamics lifts to EML-2. ZLB and regime shifts = TYPE 2 Horizons with shadow=2. Volcker disinflation = TYPE 2 Horizon: credibility jump = non-constructive EML-∞, but the inflation decay path = EML-2 shadow. Sunspot equilibria (indeterminacy) = EML-∞, shadow=2. MACRO DEPTH LADDER: Static(EML-0) → DSGE(EML-2) → Regime shifts(EML-∞,shadow=2).
rabbit_hole_log: Phillips + Taylor + DSGE: EML-2 closed subring (log-linear macro)
Static multiplier: EML-0 (algebraic ratio); dynamics → EML-2
ZLB = TYPE 2 Horizon; Volcker = TYPE 2 Horizon; both shadow=2
Sunspot equilibria: EML-∞, shadow=2 (multiple equilibria = non-constructive)
Log-linearization = the KEY move that keeps macro in EML-2
